logs.querydefinition.CfnAbout: Creates a query definition for CloudWatch Logs Insights. For more information, see [ Analyzing Log Data with CloudWatch Logs Insights](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/AnalyzingLogData.html).

logs.querydefinition.LogGroupNames.Description: Use this parameter if you want the query to query only certain log groups.

logs.querydefinition.Name.Description: A name for the query definition.

logs.querydefinition.QueryString.Description: The query string to use for this query definition. For more information, see [ CloudWatch Logs Insights Query Syntax](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonCloudWatch/latest/logs/CWL_QuerySyntax.html).
